visual_description: A person in a dark green suit sits at a table with a closed black briefcase in front of them. Their hands are visible as they open the briefcase, revealing a white rectangular object inside. The person then removes the object and places it back on top of the briefcase.
audio_description: A metallic clinking sound is heard as the briefcase is opened, followed by a male voice speaking in a calm, inquisitive tone.
